summary: Re-review after a 3rd case was ADDED. Cases 1 (HIGH) and 2 (control) are unchanged from prior approval and remain faithful. New case 3 (multi-poll CRITICAL) is faithful: persistence + recursive-mint corroborator close the transient-bridging escape hatch that kept case 1 at HIGH, matching case 1's own 'CRITICAL reserved for multi-poll corroboration' note; arithmetic and snapshot keys verified, fidelity honestly disclosed.

per_case.unbacked-at-collapse: UNCHANGED + FAITHFUL. Identical to prior approval (snapshots/xUSD.json, HIGH floor). should_fire UNBACKED_SUPPLY @ token:xUSD HIGH follows from ~$530M looped/borrowed + ~200M circulating vs ~$170M NAV; HIGH floor defensible (single snapshot proves breach but cannot exclude transient bridging skew). node_id and backing/remote_supply keys present in snapshot.
per_case.balanced-inflight-bridging-fp-trap: UNCHANGED + FAITHFUL. Identical to prior approval. Synthetic over-backed control (backing 170M > Sigma 168M) correctly asserts must_not_fire; over-backed is the safe direction and silencing it guards against hair-trigger FPs on benign bridging/rounding skew. node_id token:xUSD and backing/remote_supply present in xUSD_balanced.json.
per_case.unbacked-persists-corroborated-critical: FAITHFUL. (a) Persistence: EVENT.md says the CBB0FE 4.1x / ~$170M-vs-$530M breach was flagged ~Oct 28 and did NOT clear through the Nov 4 freeze/depeg (~a week); a two-poll same-snapshot structure 33 min apart is a conservative, fair model of 'breach persisted past the bridge-settlement window'. (b) Sigma circulating verified = 85,818,938.309987 (Ethereum REAL @ block 23725820) + 114,181,061.690013 (researched) = exactly 200,000,000 tokens (6dp) > 170,000,000 backing -> 30M-token gap; matches EVENT.md ~200M circ vs ~170M NAV. (c) supply_samples 50M->62M->85.8M with +23.82M final-window spike terminating EXACTLY at the measured-real 85.818938309987M Ethereum supply is a faithful MODEL of the recursive mint (terminal value is real on-chain; intermediate ramp disclosed MEDIUM confidence), not a fabrication. (d) CRITICAL is the faithful severity: persistence + ongoing-mint corroboration close case 1's single-poll transient-skew escape hatch, exactly per case 1's own note that CRITICAL is reserved for multi-poll-corroborated breaches; the real breach was persistent ~3-4x = a page-now state. No overclaim: Ethereum supply REAL, cross-chain + backing researcher-asserted, samples modeled, all disclosed. node_id token:xUSD + backing/remote_supply/supply_samples/circulating keys all present in xUSD_persist.json.
